finding: Selective two-agent ensemble (LGBM+TCN, de-biased) beats every single agent under leak-free walk-forward selection
rationale: LGBM and TCN are the two strongest agents and the least correlated pair (Spearman 0.119). Restricting the ensemble to them (excluding weak/short-biased mamba,patch) and de-biasing before combining lets diversification help.
conclusion: Under honest (leak-free) evaluation the ensemble dominates; under OOS-overfit selection single LGBM wins. The ensemble is the more robust/regime-balanced choice.
